creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #2)
No, the project has no changelog file or anything. They cut releases on github, and every release only has a list of commits including in that release.

Every time I update this port, I go through all those commits to see if there are changes besides the torrent tracker definitions. If so, I list those here.

And sorry about the maintainer-approval + on the bug report.
